message:
test(oracle): Integration tests for unified OracleReport and expanded mutations (309 lines)

Validates the unified oracle report infrastructure end-to-end:

Unified report tests:
- Clean suite produces all 12 oracles passing (total=12, failed=0)
- JSON serialization roundtrip preserves all fields (entries, stats,
  passed/failed counts, check_time)
- Deterministic report output: identical lab runs produce identical
  reports
- to_text() produces parseable human-readable output
- Individual entry lookup via report.entry("task_leak") etc.

New mutation detection tests:
- ActorLeak mutation: baseline clean, mutation detected by actor_leak oracle
- SupervisionRestartLimitExceeded mutation: baseline clean, mutation
  detected by supervision oracle
- MailboxCapacityExceeded mutation: baseline clean, mutation detected
  by mailbox oracle

Meta coverage tests:
- MetaRunner with all builtin_mutations() now covers actor_leak,
  supervision, and mailbox invariants (no missing invariants)
- MetaRunner deterministic: same seed produces identical mutation
  results across runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
